summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Rooms page refinement. All requirements successfully validated - profile summary removed, duplicated actions eliminated, hero focused, single form implementation, design consistency maintained.
passed_tests: Profile summary card successfully removed from Rooms page (present in dashboard, absent in rooms)
Duplicated lower action selector/tab section successfully removed (no tab elements found)
Hero section remains focused with title, description, and 3 primary action buttons
Single form card implementation working correctly - switches between create/join modes
Form functionality intact - all inputs, dropdowns, and buttons working properly
Design language consistency maintained with dashboard (same branding, spacing, card styles)
Header navigation buttons present and functional
Page loads without errors and all interactive elements accessible
Form validation and state management working correctly
